_comment: Example hook configurations for Claude Code. Add these to your ~/.claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key.

_example_1_auto_format._description: Auto-format files after Claude edits them (developer use case)

_example_2_notification._description: Send a notification when Claude finishes a task (all roles)

hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished your task" with title "Claude Code"'

_example_3_auto_timestamp._description: Add a timestamp to files Claude creates (non-technical use case)

_example_4_test_gate._description: Require tests to pass before Claude declares a task complete (developer use case)
